reviews.comment:
La atencion de ACA es buena. Para renovar el registro que es personal del GCBA (recepción excluido) es pesimo. Se cae el sistema seguido y el personal es agresivo y maltratador. (Excepto muchacho fotos y las cajas). Otro tema. Falta pintar de amarillo el cordon sobre av libertador y alli vi llevarse varios autos la grua. Hacian cola las gruas para llevarse los autos.

(Translated by Google)
ACA's service is good. The renewing of registration is done by the GCBA staff (excluding reception) and is terrible. The system crashes frequently, and the staff is aggressive and abusive (except for the photo and checkout staff). Another issue: The curb on Libertador Avenue needs to be painted yellow, and I saw several cars being towed there. The tow trucks were lining up to take the cars.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3dk42bmRBEAE
